title: Rebuild dental clinic app after deployment failure

requirements.text: Restore and redeploy the full dental clinic booking website with all previously implemented features: appointment booking, doctor profiles, services grid, testimonials carousel, before/after slider, contact section, admin dashboard (appointments, reviews, services, doctor scheduler, before/after manager, clinic status control), and Internet Identity authentication.
acceptanceCriteria: The home page loads with hero section, services, doctor profile, before/after slider, testimonials, and contact sections.
The appointment booking dialog opens and allows patients to submit bookings.
The admin dashboard is accessible via the hidden footer tooth logo login and shows all management pages.
Clinic status (open/closed/emergency) is fetched from the backend and reflected in the header and hero section.
All backend queries (appointments, services, reviews, doctors, clinic status) return data without errors.
The app deploys successfully without errors.

constraints: Do not change the existing backend data schema or stable state.
Admin authentication must remain sessionStorage-based with the hidden footer tooth logo trigger.
Immutable frontend paths must not be modified.
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond what was previously implemented.
Changing the visual design or branding.
